data.name: Hentai Aqua Lorelei
data.detailed_description:
🎮 💧 Hentai Aqua Lorelei is not just an adult puzzle game. It's your journey into the depths of an enchanting aquatic world, home to the seductive Lorelei — a water maiden who knows how to stir your imagination... and more.


Each level is a drop of her body, an echo of her desire — a piece you can only reveal by completing every puzzle. Bit by bit, you uncover her sensual nature — transparent curves, intoxicating poses, and a playful gaze… Lorelei is waiting for you to prove you're worthy of seeing her fully.


🔞 Game Features:

💦 30 erotic levels — each puzzle reveals a new fragment of Lorelei’s story.

🏆 30 achievements — become a true master of water puzzles.

🖼️ Gallery — unlock and save the most tempting illustrations.


🎯 3 difficulty levels — from gentle immersion to a true challenge:

  • Easy — smooth immersion, minimal effort.

  • Normal — a bit of challenge, maximum pleasure.

  • Hard — a true test, but Lorelei reveals herself only to the most enduring.


Feel the temptation of the water element, dive into Lorelei’s world, and let her dissolve you in waves of desire.

data.short_description: Dive into the world of the water goddess Lorelei, where every movement is a dance of desire, and every glance ignites a fire of passion within you.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
